determinant_checks.comment: CT support path is indirect at T1 but substantively linked through perceived climate benefit.
Contemporaneous climate anxiety positively predicts CT support and perceived climate benefit.
T1 effect on CT support is indirect via perceived personal benefit; still a valid predictor.
Contemporaneous economic anticipation directly and indirectly increases CT support.
Direct CT-support mechanism; strong positive association in the carbon-tax model.
Direct CT-support mechanism; positive association with carbon-tax support.
Significant demographic control, not a substantive determinant of carbon-tax support.
determinant_checks.suggested_correction: Move to controls; exclude from determinant list.

final_recommendation_summary: Keep the paper in the strict carbon-tax corpus. The CT-support determinants are correctly extracted, but age should be reclassified as a demographic control rather than a determinant.
